case_title: THE CONTINENTAL CORPORATION, A CORPORATION vs. ALTA ROOFING AND WATERPROOFING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1993, OFF CALENDAR DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CONTINENTAL CORPORATION, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTA ROOFING AND WATERPROOFING COMPANY $3,996.50 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,116.50
